name: reva-teaching-learning-reva
description: TRACK Educator Plugin: Coordinates syllabus design, session planning, content generation, and course integrity audits.

copilotAgents.name: reva-educator
copilotAgents.description: Ask REVA Educator agent for syllabus design, active learning templates, and course audits.

slashCommands.name: audit
slashCommands.description: Run academic integrity and AI-triviality audits on course assessments.

slashCommands.name: course-check
slashCommands.description: Audit course syllabus drafts for NBA-OBE alignment and Bloom's HOTS dominance.

slashCommands.name: assessment-check
slashCommands.description: Audit course assessments for Bloom's levels, enjoyability, and AI-triviality bypass.

slashCommands.name: build-course-buddy
slashCommands.description: Build a new Course Buddy (Obsidian wiki, Jupyter workbook, Socratic tutor skill) from a course descriptor. Runs the course-buddy-builder pipeline. Faculty use only — not student-facing.
